title: Error Handling Auditor — Continuous AST Scan & Auto-Fix Pipeline
description: error_handling_auditor.py is an AST-based static analyzer that finds bare except:/except Exception: pass patterns across the codebase, classifying findings as critical/high/medium. 652 findings were identified in the initial run; top 6 critical fixed. Gap: the auditor runs on-demand only — new bare-except patterns can be introduced in new code without being caught in CI, and auto-fix is not implemented.
missing: CI pre-commit hook: run error_handling_auditor on changed Python files in every PR and fail if any new critical/high bare-except patterns are introduced
Auto-fix generator: for bare except: blocks, generate an AST-based fix that wraps them in except Exception as e: with structlog.exception(e) logging
Auditor findings → vuln_lifecycle: persist auditor findings as DISCOVERED findings in vuln_lifecycle.db so they are tracked through the remediation pipeline
